nasb.text: Revive me according to Your lovingkindness, So that I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.

esv.text: In your steadfast love give me life, that I may keep the testimonies of your mouth.

cnv.text: 求你照著你的慈愛使我存活， 我就必謹守你口中的法度。

ccb.text: 求你施慈爱保护我的性命， 我好遵守你赐下的法度。

csbs.text: 求你照着你的慈爱使我存活， 我就持守你口中的法度。
